channel.title: SSbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Multiple injured, one critically, after seaplane with 11 aboard crashes in Washington state
item.description: Several people were hurt, including one in critical condition, after a seaplane carrying 11 people crashed off the Washington coast.

item.title: Trump to attend rescheduled White House correspondents' dinner on Friday
item.description: President Donald Trump is set to attend the postponed White House Correspondents' Association Dinner on Friday evening.

item.title: Wildfire forces 40,000 tourists and residents to flee French peninsula
item.description: Several firefighters have been killed as France, Spain and Italy all battle wildfires that have forced tens of thousands to evacuate a vacation hotspot.

item.title: Head of euthanasia firm dies while climbing Mount Fuji
item.description: A Swiss man died after losing consciousness hiking up Mount Fuji, marking the second fatality in one week on the iconic mountain.
